column1: # IMPORTANT: changing this file requires full erase_flash before upload.
#     Without erase: bootloader finds app at old offset -> boot loop.
# NOTE: app0 kept at traditional 0x10000 for PlatformIO esptool compatibility.
#   PlatformIO Arduino-ESP32 hardcodes boot_app0.bin to 0xe000 and firmware to
#   0x10000 by default. Moving these requires custom upload_flags (complex).
